content.text:
All assertions passed.

VERIFIED

- Created `src/errors.js` with `class AppError extends Error` — instances have `.name === 'AppError'`, `.code`, and `.message` (human text only, no code prefix).
- Converted all 9 throw sites across `validate.js`, `parse.js`, `money.js`, `range.js`, `store.js`, `auth.js`, `format.js`, `calc.js`, `dates.js` to `throw new AppError(code, message)`.
- Re-exported `AppError` from `src/index.js` via `...require('./errors.js')`.
- Zero `new Error(` calls remain anywhere in `src/`.
